fields.name: auth_token
fields.label: Auth Token
fields.description: Required when auth_type is bearer or api_key (not for oauth2)

fields.name: oauth2_credential_id
fields.label: OAuth 2.0 Credential ID
fields.description: UUID of an OAuth 2.0 API Client credential in the same org; required when auth_type is oauth2

fields.name: staging_oauth2_credential_id
fields.label: Staging OAuth 2.0 Credential ID
fields.description: Optional UUID override for staging environment; falls back to oauth2_credential_id

fields.name: development_oauth2_credential_id
fields.label: Development OAuth 2.0 Credential ID
fields.description: Optional UUID override for development environment; falls back to oauth2_credential_id

fields.name: auth_header_name
fields.label: Auth Header Name
fields.description: Custom header name for api_key auth (default: X-API-Key)

fields.name: custom_headers
fields.label: Custom Headers
fields.description: Additional HTTP headers as a JSON object (e.g. {"x-agent-type": "my-agent"})

data.name: Richpanel

credential_types.description: Richpanel API credentials for escalation to human agents

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your Richpanel API key

fields.name: webhook_secret
fields.label: Webhook Secret
fields.description: Secret for validating incoming webhooks from Richpanel (X-API-Key header)
